feed.title: Study notes
feed.subtitle: Learning is a great process that make you a better person

entry.title: cron task
entry.summary: 我设置了一个定时任务来跟踪 cw 网站上的价格变化，代码是这样的：schedule.scheduleJob(“* * */5 * * *”, () => {…});。我预期这个任务每 5 小时运行一次。然而，很快我发现 record 函数频繁运行，大概每一秒一次。后来查阅资料后，才知道 ～～～ The cron expression * * */5 * * * breaks down as follows: First *: every second Second *: every minute */5: every 5 hours ～～～ For running the schedule every 5 minutes, the correct cron expression should be 0 */5 * * * *, which t...

entry.title: Strong typed Polymorphic component
entry.summary: Creating an polymorphic component In this example, we’ll leverage typescript to build a strong typed component that can have its only props instead of setting all props as optional props strong typed component, let say if we have an Component called ‘MyComponent’ with as props to be img, then the compiler should give us a warning that img element need to have src and alt pros <MyC...

entry.title: Dropdown manual with recursive method
entry.summary: Creating a Recursive List Menu Any Number of Levels Deep In this example, we’ll leverage recursion to build a menu that can have an unlimited number of nested levels. And the result will looks like this: Before diving into the task at hand, it is essential to establish the data type we are working with. Think about a scenario where we aim to display an image using a URL stored w...

entry.title: debounce
entry.summary: debounce what is debounce A debounce function in JavaScript ensures that your code is executed only once per user input. It is commonly used for scenarios such as search box suggestions, text-field auto-saves, thereby enhancing user experience and optimizing performance. how debounce works,check the link The principle of debounce is to wait for a certain period of time (the ...

entry.title: 3D CSS
entry.summary: 3D transform-style: flat vs transform-style: preserve-3d refer to link The transform-style CSS property sets whether children of an element are positioned in the 3D space or are flattened in the plane of the element, in short, preserve-3d 可以立体穿透。 Each 3D element with z>0 becomes larger; each 3D-element with z<0 becomes smaller. The strength of the effect is determ...
